case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WHITE, VENESSA AKA VANESSA WHITE et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WHITE, VENESSA AKA VANESSA WHITE

JUDGE:RICHARD KOSSOW;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:WAIVED 3:00PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF THRU COUNSEL PRESENT WITH DEFT APPEARING PROPER. CASE SETTLED. COURT ASKED DEFT IF SHE AGREED TO THE STIPULATION EMBODIED IN THE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION - THAT SHE IS GOING TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY NOV. 13, 1995 AND THAT SHE OWED $3,412 ON PLFF, AND EVERYTHING THEREIN, AND SHE SAID "YES". AFTERWARDS, COURT SIGNED THE "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION".
